name: Chili Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 lb ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add chicken, celery, bell peppers, onions, and garlic. Stir until the chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in salt, water, stewed tomatoes, rice, tomato paste, sugar, and chili powder.
4. Cover and simmer for 25 minutes or until the rice is done. Stir occasionally.
